title: Search
description: A search input with leading search icon, value clearing, and optional filter state.
whenToUse: For searching across a dataset or page. Place prominently when search is the primary action.
whenNotToUse: For generic text entry — use Text Input. For dropdown-with-typeahead — use a combobox pattern.
_legacyAccessibilityNotes: Use type="search" for semantic meaning. Provide an accessible label (aria-label or visible label).
